name: Yellow Blue Bus LLC
recent_news: No public news found; not surfaced in WA UTC or news searches. Everett SD service is provided primarily by Durham (Summit) and Everett Transit, suggesting Yellow Blue Bus is a very small/marginal operator if active.
fit_notes: Micro-scale (~10 employees, ~$414K rev) single-owner LLC in Everett, WA (a Durham/Summit market). Too small to be a meaningful standalone tuck-in; only relevant as an asset/route grab if owner Jae Hong is exiting.

name: Debaere Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Prior Lake-Savage Area Schools (via Prior Lake School Bus Association)
recent_news: Long-standing Prior Lake-area school bus contractor (since 1975). Operates as a member of the Prior Lake School Bus Association cooperative, which collectively serves PLSAS. Busse Student Transportation is the larger affiliated PLSAS provider.
fit_notes: Multigenerational MN family operator (50+ years) with single-district exposure via a cooperative association. Small fleet but classic succession profile; meaningful only as part of a roll-up of the Prior Lake association members (Busse + others).

name: School Bus Rides LLC
recent_news: Founded 2013 by Oberlin College students Samsun Knight and August Olsen as a student-run discount intercity charter alternative to Wilder Lines (NYC/Cleveland break trips). Not a K-12 home-to-school contractor.
fit_notes: NOT a fit: this is a charter/intercity shuttle for Oberlin College student trips, not a school district contractor. Address (1451 Oberlin College) confirms campus-based operation. Exclude from Summit tuck-in pipeline.

name: Priester Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: formerly Pipestone Area Schools (subcontractor under Ludolph Bus ~15 yrs); exited PAS contract after 2017-18 school year
recent_news: 2012 bus barn fire destroyed 7 buses (~$690K loss). 2017: Jerry Priester announced he would stop serving Pipestone Area Schools after 2017-18 SY, citing the school board's busing decisions. Status as active operator post-2018 is unclear.
fit_notes: Likely wound down or quasi-dormant: 2nd-gen family operator that publicly exited its sole school contract in 2018. Not a viable operating tuck-in unless verified to have re-contracted; possibly a defunct/asset-only situation.

name: Sue's Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Local central MN districts (Milaca/Princeton area; specific contracts not disclosed)
recent_news: Long-tenured (~66 years per ZoomInfo/Yelp) family-owned MN school bus operator. USDOT 945763 active. No M&A or ownership-change news found.
fit_notes: Solid MN tuck-in candidate: 27-bus, ~30-driver family operator with 60+ year history and a female owner-operator (succession likely). Larger than the 10-employee universe field suggests. Worth direct outreach to Susan Westling; geography (Bock/Milaca corridor) complements MN platform builds.
